Austin TX Front End Developer Guillermo Hernandez Jr Front End Developer for hire

About

My name is Guillermo Hernandez Jr and I’m a front end web developer who lives with my dog, Jean-Claude Van Damme, on the east side of Austin, TX. When I’m not in front of a computer creating, you can find me behind a drum set or chasing after my dog at the park.
